recommendations.title: A Moment to Remember
recommendations.overview: A young couple's love is tested when Sun-jin is diagnosed with a rare form of Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: Operation Chromite
recommendations.overview: A squad of soldiers fight in the Korean War's crucial Battle of Incheon.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: 71: Into the Fire
recommendations.overview: In August 1950, waiting for UN troops to arrive, the South Korean army assembled to protect Nakdong River. Only 71 student-soldiers are left behind to guard the city of Pohang. Now they are on a mission to defend the country from North Korean troops.

recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The comedic modern-day quintet takes on their 2003 counterparts when villains from each of their worlds join forces to pit the two Titan teams against each other. They'll need to set aside their differences and work together to combat Trigon, Hexagon

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: Monster High: Boo York, Boo York

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Meet the Robinsons
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

recommendations.title: Pee-wee's Big Holiday
recommendations.overview: A fateful meeting with a mysterious stranger inspires Pee-wee Herman to take his first-ever holiday.
